top_insights: Wealth isn't a number; it's the leverage threshold where your time becomes irrelevant.
Formal degrees teach compliance; self-education teaches you how to break the rules.
Public figures are brands; the real power lies in the unseen mechanics they hide.
Storytelling isn't soft skill; it's the only leverage that scales without capital.
Creator-led businesses solve real problems; corporate giants just optimize for shareholder panic.
hook_patterns: Insight-driven statements revealing hidden mechanisms or truths
Contrarian takes challenging conventional wisdom or status quo
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique perspective
emotional_drivers: Validation of the audience's existing beliefs or skepticism
Ambition and desire for success/wealth creation
emerging_narrative: A shift toward 'insider truth' where audiences resonate with content that exposes the mechanics of power, wealth, and success, often framed through personal stories or contrarian takes that validate their skepticism of mainstream narratives.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I’ve never told this story before publicly but, I used to be a journalist covering human trafficking on the US Mexico border. I’ve crossed the border illegally covering migrants and cartels countless times. I saw young women in the morgue after they were raped and brutalized in Show more

winning_patterns: Insight-driven statements revealing hidden mechanisms or truths
Contrarian takes challenging conventional wisdom or status quo
Personal anecdotes establishing authority or unique perspective
avoid_recent_hooks: The real problem isn't your content.

You're not an employee.
You're a hostage.
Stop believing that confidence comes from preparation.
